name: Chewy Pecan Cookie Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the sugar, mayonnaise, and vanilla until well blended.
2. Stir in the flour mixture and add half of the pecans. The dough will be thick and sticky.
3. Press the dough into a well-greased 8-inch square baking pan.
4. Sprinkle the remaining nuts over the top of the dough.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes, or until a pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cookies to cool in the pan on a rack before cutting into about 12 squares.
